# Vendored font sources

Retrieved on 2026-07-21 from the Google Fonts CSS API as browser-optimized
WOFF2 subsets. The generated declarations are stored in `styles/fonts.css`.

Families and requested axes:

- DM Sans: normal and italic, optical size 9–40, weights 300–700
- Fraunces: normal and italic, optical size 9–144, weights 300–800
- JetBrains Mono: normal, weights 400–500
- Syne: normal, weights 400–800

Source request:

```text
https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300..700;1,9..40,300..700&family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300..800;1,9..144,300..800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400..500&family=Syne:wght@400..800&display=swap
```

Upstream family repositories:

- https://github.com/googlefonts/dm-fonts
- https://github.com/undercasetype/Fraunces
- https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono
- https://github.com/bonjour-monde/syne-typeface

All included font files are distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1;
see `OFL.txt` in this directory. The hashed filenames are the immutable asset
names returned by Google Fonts and are deliberately preserved for traceability.
